transcript.content: Sarah from work disagreed with my sister Sarah at dinner last night. Work-Sarah thinks the team needs more structure; sister-Sarah thinks the opposite. Anyway, work-Sarah just got promoted to senior PM.

expected.tolerance_reason: two distinct Sarahs in one transcript. Extractor emits at slug='sarah'; queue-level disambiguation accumulates qualifier_candidates ['coworker', 'sister']. Eval passes if at least one Sarah-fact emits with the expected qualifier in qualifier_candidates.
